pi_items.source: task.json description line 5 and export_result.sh line 31 - username derived from email format elena.rodriguez@dev.arkcase.com for LDAP/Samba AD authentication
task.json description line 5 - email format follows dev.arkcase.com domain used in test ArkCase environment as seen in setup_arkcase.sh:254 and task_utils.sh:10
task.json description line 5 and verifier.py line 83 - first name verified against LDAP givenName attribute in export_result.sh:39
task.json description line 5 and verifier.py line 85 - last name verified against LDAP sn (surname) attribute in export_result.sh:40

task.json description line 5 and metadata line 22, export_result.sh:46 - group membership verified via samba-tool group listmembers command; group referenced in multiple task setup scripts (reassign_complaint_case/setup_task.sh:40) as standard ArkCase test environment group
task.json line 25 and verifier.py line 50 - points awarded when result.get('ldap_user_exists') is True
task.json line 26 and verifier.py lines 82-91 - points split: 8 for givenName match + 7 for sn (surname) match = 15 total
task.json line 27 and verifier.py lines 94-98 - points awarded when attrs.get('mail') matches expected email
task.json line 28 and verifier.py lines 101-105 - points awarded when group_membership.is_member is True
task.json line 29 and verifier.py lines 108-112 - points awarded when api_verification.user_found is True based on ArkCase REST API response
task.json line 30 and verifier.py lines 115-141 - points awarded for VLM verification of UI workflow navigation to Administration/User Management panel
task.json description line 4 and setup_arkcase.sh:254 and task_utils.sh:10 - admin credentials for test ArkCase environment created during Helm deployment
task.json description line 4 and setup_arkcase.sh:250 and task_utils.sh:11 - admin password set during ArkCase LDAP initialization with samba-tool
task.json description line 5 - password for new user elena.rodriguez specified in task instructions
task_utils.sh:10 and task.json description line 4 - LDAP domain for test ArkCase environment used in usernames and email addresses
task.json line 4 and env.json line 2 - test environment using ArkCase on Kubernetes with Samba AD LDAP backend

privileged_info_summary: This task uses fully synthetic test data in a development ArkCase environment running on Kubernetes. The user Elena Rodriguez (elena.rodriguez@dev.arkcase.com) is created as part of the task execution, not pre-existing. All metadata values are verified: username, email, first/last names, and group assignment (ACM_INVESTIGATOR_DEV) match the task specification. The admin account (arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!) is a verified test credential created during Helm/LDAP deployment. The scoring values (user_exists: 25, name_correct: 15, email_correct: 10, group_correct: 20, api_verified: 15, ui_workflow: 15) are verified against the verifier.py implementation. The ACM_INVESTIGATOR_DEV group is confirmed as a standard group in the test environment, referenced across multiple task setup scripts.
